description: Machine-readable error-code vocabulary for the error envelope (I3). Codes marked status:current are already emitted by the implementation; status:target are specified for upcoming reliability/compat work and not yet wired.

codes.description: Frame payload was not valid JSON / not a command.
codes.remediation: Fix the client framing or payload.

codes.description: JSON deserialization of the command failed.
codes.remediation: Validate params against the catalog schema before sending.

codes.description: No dispatch case for the command type on the connected editor.
codes.remediation: Check the command name; verify the editor package version implements it.

codes.description: Unhandled exception in the editor handler.
codes.remediation: Inspect editor logs / details.stackTrace; file a bug.
Correct the parameters to satisfy the catalog params schema.

codes.description: Editor is compiling; command cannot run yet.
Command is not permitted during Play Mode.
codes.remediation: Exit Play Mode, or use a play-mode-safe command.

codes.description: A domain reload interrupted command execution.
codes.remediation: Re-query outcome via the journal / re-issue the command.

codes.description: Command/feature is unavailable on the connected Unity version.
codes.remediation: Use a supported editor version, or a version-appropriate command.

codes.description: Server and editor speak incompatible protocol majors.
codes.remediation: Update whichever half is older so both share a protocol major.

codes.description: Connected editor's project path does not match the targeted project.
codes.remediation: Point the server at the correct editor instance / port.

codes.description: A destructive command requires explicit confirm:true.
codes.remediation: Re-issue with confirm:true after verifying intent.
